title: 8Pcs Unbreakable Cereal Bowls Set, 655ml Lightweight Bowl, Reusable Plastic Bowls for Party, Picnics, Camping, Breakfast, Salad, Pasta, Soup, Noodles, Snack (Black)
features: Unbreakable & Lightweight: When we say unbreakable cereal bowls, we really mean it! The unbreakable bowl protects elderly hurt from the broken bowl. They are also lightweight, making them convenient to carry for outdoor activities like camping, and making them easy for little hands to hold onto

Multipurpose Bowls: The plastic bowls deep enough for cereal, salad, fruit, rice and noodle without splashed out. Great for parties, picnic, camping, and everyday meals at home, school, office, outdoor or traveling. Enjoy your everyday meals at home or outdoors
Dishwasher & Microwave Safe:These unbreakable salad bowls are very easy to clean, you can wash them into your dishwasher.And they work great in microwaves without getting too hot

Value Set: 8 reusable black cereal bowls in a timeless, stylish color palette that adds a modern touch to your everyday life. Suitable for most kitchen environments, these bowls bring a touch of sophistication to every family member's mealtime

Ergonomic Design: Their ergonomic shape, ideal as both cereal bowls and soup bowls, combines space-efficiency with smooth, rounded edges, delivering a tactile comfort unmatched. Including 8 x 655ml cereal bowls with size 15cm
description: Product Description Enjoy your mealtimes with Esilihom tableware Versatile & Stylish – Perfect for Any Occasion! Whether it's Halloween, Thanksgiving, or Christmas, our bowls are the perfect choice. These bowls are space-saving and durable, making them unbreakable and a reliable option for any occasion. Their classic and elegant design adds a touch of sophistication to your table setting. Enjoy a convenient and reassuring dining experience, whether indoors or outdoors. Safe & Hassle-Free – Your Everyday Dining Companion! Our versatile plastic dinner bowls are made from safe materials, providing peace of mind. These bowls are unbreakable, lightweight, and comfortable to use. Perfect for everyday dining, they are stackable, microwave-safe, and easy to clean in the dishwasher. Enjoy pasta, salads, and other meals without the hassle of washing dishes. Esilihom 8Pcs Unbreakable Cereal Bowls Set, 655ml Lightweight Bowl, Reusable ...
